title: みんなの人気者の後に・ド根性！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara is on a losing streak, but that doesn't
slow her down. Because of this, people have
started to call her "the Umamusume who never
gives up!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among them are people in her fan club. Meeting
them boosts Haru Urara's spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her fiery motivation, I am determined to
find a specific race for Haru Urara to set her
sights on. Once she has that, I'll do whatever it
takes to help her win.
